boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.messageGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
boundary.messageNamed: An error occurred in the {{component}} component. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

http.403: You don't have permission to do that.
http.500: Server error. Please try again later.

finalize.generic: Unable to finalize the report. Please try again.
finalize.seat_expired: Your edit session expired. Re-acquire the review seat and try again.
finalize.seat-expired: Your edit session expired. Re-acquire the review seat and try again.
finalize.seat-taken: Another reviewer is currently holding the review seat.
finalize.no_review_seat: No active review seat. Open the case to acquire one before finalizing.
finalize.analysis_not_complete: The analysis is not yet complete. Finalize is only available for completed analyses.
finalize.finalize-failed: The server rejected the finalize request. Please try again.
finalize.mfa_required: Step-up multi-factor authentication is required to finalize.
